subject: Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) Portfolio Update
body:
Investment Committee,

Quarterly update on our commercial real estate portfolio:

Portfolio Summary:
- Total assets under management: $82M
- Number of properties: 12
- Weighted average cap rate: 6.8%
- Occupancy rate: 94.2%
- NOI (trailing 12 months): $5.6M

Performance by Sector:
- Industrial/Logistics (4 properties): 98% occupied, 7.2% cap rate
- Office (3 properties): 88% occupied, 6.5% cap rate
- Retail (3 properties): 92% occupied, 7.1% cap rate
- Multifamily (2 properties): 96% occupied, 5.8% cap rate

Notable Events:
- Acquired 45K sq ft industrial property in Austin for $8.2M (7.5% cap rate)
- Renewed 3 office leases with avg 4% rent increase
- One retail tenant (12K sq ft) gave notice of non-renewal effective June 30

Distribution:
- Q1 distribution: $1.4M ($0.82/unit)
- Annualized yield: 6.8%

Recommendation: Reduce office exposure from 25% to 18% of portfolio; redeploy into industrial/logistics.
